Reading the Pro · Engagement Signals

A Pro is always telling you how to sell to them

It comes through in four signals — their energy, their trust, their pace, and their readiness. Each one points to a different move.

You'll take the four in turn. For each: hear the same question answered two ways, decide how you'd adjust, then check your read against the signal.

All four signals · complete

You've read all four.

  • Four signals, every call. Energy, trust, pace, and readiness are what you're reading while the Pro talks.
  • The signal changes your move, not your script. And watch the look-alikes — skeptical isn't disengaged, and a slow pace isn't low interest.
